body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.

**Mindfulness on the brain: areview of structural and functional MRI findings in mindfulness-based stress reduction.**. European journal of radiology.. PMID: 41422646. DOI: 10.1016/j.ejrad.2025.112619. Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction (MBSR) is an evidence-based program that integrates meditation, bodily awareness, and yoga to manage stress and reduce anxiety. Neuroimaging studies suggest that MBSR modulates brain networks involved in emotion regulation, self-awareness, and attention, though findings remain inconsistent.
